news.title: Powell sees inflation outlook in check, no need to hike rates because of oil shock

news.title: Trump says U.S. will destroy Iran’s oil wells, Kharg Island without deal to 'immediately' reopen Hormuz Strait

news.title: All eyes on the S&P 500 after other indexes slip into correction territory, says NYSE insider Jay Woods

news.title: Fed chief Powell says risks to economy suggest rates could go lower or higher
